case_title: SUGAYAN, VALENTINE D. vs. COLOMBINI, RUDY IND/DBA PACIFIC EQUITIES CO.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUGAYAN, VALENTINE D. AS TO DEFENDANT COLOMBINI, RUDY IND/DBA PACIFIC EQUITIES CO.
